category_sources: Official GitHub README says zns is a command-line utility for querying DNS records with human-readable colored output.
source_facts.description: CLI tool for querying DNS records with readable, colored output.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading is znscli/zns and README title is zns.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, DNS query options, JSON output, and file output examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/znscli/zns; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include dns, cli, and client; GitHub language summary is Go.
Official README describes terminal DNS lookup behavior and options.
